name: Standard Chartered Smart Credit Card
exclusions: fuel transactions are not eligible for cashback
milestoneBenefits: Renewal fee reversed for clients with spends greater than or equal to INR 1,20,000 in the preceding year
additionalBenefits: 2% cashback on online spends up to INR 1,000 per month
1% cashback on other spends up to INR 500 per month
0.99% per month on eligible 3-month EMI with nil processing fee
Extended interest-free credit period for first 90 days post issuance by paying minimum amount due

salaried: Applicant age should be between 18 and 65 years
selfEmployed: Applicant age should be between 18 and 65 years
